mapper.select: SELECT block_ip, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM CMS_BOARD_IP_BLOCK ORDER BY add_date DESC
SELECT block_ip, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM CMS_BOARD_IP_BLOCK WHERE block_ip = #{block_ip}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_IP_BLOCK SET use_yn = #{use_yn}, remark = #{remark}, add_date = SYSDATE, add_id = #{add_id} WHERE block_ip = #{block_ip}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_IP_BLOCK WHERE block_ip = #{block_ip}
